description: Composition Grey trousers made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides, two pockets on the back with button closure, belt loops at waist, and a zipper and button closure on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Crafted from soft cotton and designed with a cut that offers a flattering silhouette, these chinos from highlander make for a great addition to your semi-formal wardrobe. Pair them with a semi-formal shirt, throw over a blazer and slip into suede shoes. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
